visible_suite_green: yes except test_config_document_intelligence.py::test_defaults_disable_ingestion_and_qa, the known env conflict (excluded from p2p; points at config defaults, not the stale-recovery fix — no leak)
litmus_result: PASS — the instruction publishes the module path + function/return signatures + response field names (all imported/asserted by gold tests, underivable in <2 min) but not the staleness comparison, timezone handling, gating set arithmetic, reaper structure, or the recovery permutations now enforced only by hidden breadth tests. No single defect file to locate; it is a multi-file feature build.
fairness_audit: All 8 new breadth tests plus the 9 round-1 gold tests (17 total) were re-run against a materially different but behaviorally-correct alternative stale_recovery.py (member-iteration normalize, loop-based progress-time resolution, timedelta staleness with a 60s floor, a _resolve_service helper, comprehension query build) — 20/20 passed, so the suite asserts observable behavior, not the oracle's internals. Collaborators are patched at their defining modules (SMBApplication.get, UserDocument.get/find) and fakes are SimpleNamespace with explicit attributes (is_deleted=False, explicit None error/timestamps) so no bare MagicMock leaks into staleness or pydantic logic. The one service-seam assertion kept (re_enqueue ready -> False) is universal; the impl-coupled fresh-queued-guard and beanie-find-dependent True-path assertions were deliberately excluded.

leak_checks.notes: Dockerfile flattens history (rm -rf .git && git init -qb main && commit 'import codebase') so the descendant fix commit a6f2dd0, reflog, and stashes are unreachable. All gold + breadth tests enter only via config.json test_patch at verify time; none are present in the agent-visible tree at base.

notes: Breadth-hardened variant. Keeps the round-3 published public API (re_enqueue_stale_document + stale_recovery module) for fairness (unpublished -> 0/10, unfair) while defeating checklist-solving: the instruction is trimmed to goal + API contract (permutation matrix and per-function behavioral enumerations removed), and 8 hidden f2p breadth tests at the public service seams enforce permutations the symptom report only implies (multi-doc sweep, mixed fresh+stale, failed excluded, idempotent repeats, reaper staleness re-check, ready guard, stale telemetry). Base ba5fa0a / fix a6f2dd0 and the oracle source diff are unchanged from ingestion-stale-blocker. No sonnet/opus probes run — chain driver owns the probe fleet.
